name: bbox-mcp-server
description: The geospatial toolkit for AI agents — query, convert, and verify spatial data with zero config.

mapbox_access_token.title: Mapbox Access Token
mapbox_access_token.description: Your Mapbox API token to enable text-based location searches (e.g. 'New York City'). Optional: If not provided, you must provide explicit coordinate bounding boxes instead.
